title: tephrosia submontana
intro: Tephrosia submontana is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of China, characterized by its small white flowers and narrow, lance-shaped leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Tephrosia submontana include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using the roots to create a decoction, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
